labels.routine: General information is appropriate; include watch-outs and standard next steps.
labels.urgent: Encourage same-day clinical contact or urgent care if symptoms persist, worsen, or combine with additional red flags.
labels.emergency: Direct the user to emergency care or emergency services. Do not soften or bury escalation.

emergency_patterns: \b(chest pain|crushing chest pressure|chest tightness)\b.*\b(shortness of breath|sweating|dizziness|faint|left arm|jaw|back)\b
required_emergency_behaviors: state that the situation may be urgent
recommend emergency help clearly and early
include crisis resource when mental health risk is present
